evidence_snippet: market_regime(root, factors) -> proxy_summary(root, 'QQQ'), proxy_summary(root, 'SPY'), proxy_summary(root, 'VIX') or '^VIX'; degraded if any missing.
qqq_hist = load_price_history(root, 'QQQ'); qqq_returns = {'20d': ret(...), '60d': ret(...)}; used in relative_strength_*_vs_qqq.
vix, vix_status, _ = proxy_summary(root, 'VIX'); if vix_status != 'OK': vix, vix_status, _ = proxy_summary(root, '^VIX').
get_vix(yf) -> download_ohlcv(yf, '^VIX', 120); write_report/read_first include VIX_CLOSE and VIX_REGIME.
compute_ticker builds BB(20), RSI(14), KDJ(9), volume ratio 5/20 from local OHLCV only.
